response.overview: Determining whether a meeting is merely an encounter or a twist of fate is quite difficult. With the arrival of Bunga Zinnirah, can Tuan Putra Anaqi change his fate after his wife's departure for so long? Bunga (Intan Najuwa) is thrown out by her adoptive father, Dato' Azka when he discovers Bunga with another man in the room! Bunga has nowhere to take shelter. However, with the help of Tuan Putra (Hisyam Hamid), Bunga can stay at his house with the domestic help, Mak Jah and Pak Jais. The incident that befalls Bunga makes Putra feel sympathy, causing him to agree to marry Bunga at Dato' Azka's insistence. Where there is love, there is hate. Tania (Sherry Ibrahim), Putra's stepsister does not approve of their marriage because she has long harbored feelings for Putra. As time goes on, their relationship becomes increasingly close and Putra begins to realize that his love for Bunga is blooming. Will something threaten their relationship?
response.title: Wanita Milik Tuan Putra
